opening_line: Hi - I read a review where joe mentioned tidy finishes on a job with Chestnut Trees & Fencing. That stood out.
source_quote:
Yesterday Chestnut Trees came to fell one large tree and reduce a second by 50% in our garden. They did it in one day.

They cut the felled tree and branches into workable pieces which I can now easily cut into logs.

They machine chipped the smaller branches making a great mound of wood chipping wh
why_this_angle: Lead with review detail about tidy finishes (joe)
suggested_whatsapp: Hi, Julius here. I build websites for local trades. One of your Google reviews from joe mentioned tidy finishes - I mocked up a one-page site around that. No obligation - want a quick look?

follow_up_replies.text: One-page site from £300. Includes mobile layout and quote form.
No problem - I will remove the preview. Thanks for your time.
